form_load_event.pattern:
Private Sub Form_Load()
    ' Initialization code here
    Text1.Text = "Hello"
    Command1.Caption = "Click Me"
End Sub

form_load_with_database.pattern:
Private Sub Form_Load()
    Dim conn As ADODB.Connection
    Dim rs As ADODB.Recordset
    
    Set conn = New ADODB.Connection
    conn.Open "Provider=Microsoft.Jet.OLEDB.4.0;Data Source=C:\data.mdb"
    
    Set rs = New ADODB.Recordset
    rs.Open "SELECT * FROM Users", conn
    
    Do While Not rs.EOF
        Combo1.AddItem rs.Fields("UserName").Value
        rs.MoveNext
    Loop
    
    rs.Close
    conn.Close
    Set rs = Nothing
    Set conn = Nothing
    
    Me.Caption = "User Management - " & Format(Now, "mm/dd/yyyy")
End Sub
form_load_with_database.description: Complex form initialization with database loading and async operations

button_click_event.pattern:
Private Sub Command1_Click()
    MsgBox "Button clicked!"
    Text1.Text = "Updated"
End Sub

textbox_change_event.pattern:
Private Sub Text1_Change()
    If Len(Text1.Text) > 10 Then
        Label1.Caption = "Too long!"
    End If
End Sub

form_closing_event.pattern:
Private Sub Form_Unload(Cancel As Integer)
    Dim response As Integer
    response = MsgBox("Are you sure?", vbYesNo)
    If response = vbNo Then
        Cancel = True
    End If
End Sub

control_property_access.pattern:
Text1.Text = "New Value"
Text1.Enabled = False
Text1.Visible = True
Command1.Caption = "OK"

dynamic_control_creation.pattern:
Dim newButton As CommandButton
Set newButton = Controls.Add("VB.CommandButton", "dynButton")
newButton.Caption = "Dynamic"
newButton.Visible = True

control_arrays.pattern:
Private Sub Text1_Change(Index As Integer)
    Select Case Index
        Case 0
            Label1.Caption = "First"
        Case 1
            Label1.Caption = "Second"
    End Select
End Sub
control_arrays.description: VB6 control arrays converted to event handler with Tag property

listbox_operations.description: Common ListBox operations - add, remove, get selected

combobox_operations.description: ComboBox operations - populate and select items

timer_control.pattern:
Private Sub Timer1_Timer()
    Label1.Caption = Format(Now, "hh:mm:ss")
End Sub

' Enable timer
Timer1.Interval = 1000
Timer1.Enabled = True

menu_creation.pattern:
' Menu created in Menu Editor
Private Sub mnuFile_Click()
    ' File menu clicked
End Sub

Private Sub mnuExit_Click()
    Unload Me
End Sub

form_positioning.pattern:
Me.Left = (Screen.Width - Me.Width) / 2
Me.Top = (Screen.Height - Me.Height) / 2
Me.WindowState = vbMaximized
form_positioning.description: Form positioning and window state management

focus_management.pattern:
Text1.SetFocus
If Text1.Focused Then
    ' Do something
End If
SendKeys "{TAB}"

drag_drop_operations.pattern:
Private Sub Text1_DragDrop(Source As Control, X As Single, Y As Single)
    Text1.Text = Source.Text
End Sub

Private Sub Text1_DragOver(Source As Control, X As Single, Y As Single, State As Integer)
    If State = vbEnter Then
        Text1.DragIcon = LoadPicture("drag.ico")
    End If
End Sub
drag_drop_operations.description: Drag and drop operations between controls

picture_box_operations.pattern:
Picture1.Picture = LoadPicture("image.bmp")
Picture1.Cls
Picture1.Print "Hello World"
Set Picture1.Picture = Nothing
picture_box_operations.description: PictureBox operations - loading images and drawing

modal_dialogs.pattern:
Dim frm As New Form2
frm.Show vbModal
Unload frm
Set frm = Nothing

form_validation.pattern:
Private Sub Text1_Validate(Cancel As Boolean)
    If Not IsNumeric(Text1.Text) Then
        MsgBox "Please enter a number"
        Cancel = True
    End If
End Sub

keyboard_events.pattern:
Private Sub Form_KeyPress(KeyAscii As Integer)
    If KeyAscii = vbKeyEscape Then
        Unload Me
    ElseIf KeyAscii = vbKeyReturn Then
        Command1_Click
    End If
End Sub
